title: CDSA Courtesy Visit To NDLEA National Headquarter - FinancialEDGE
description: Photos Caption: Chairman/Chief Executive Officer of NDLEA, Brig. Gen. MB Marwa (Rtd) CON, OFR, alongside some top officials of the Agency, receives Air Vice Marshal Lanre Ibrahim Oluwatoyin, Chief of Defence Space Administration (CDSA) and members of his delegation during their courtesy visit to the Agency's National Headquarters in Abuja on Tuesday, 29th April 2025.
html: Photos Caption: Chairman/Chief Executive Officer of NDLEA, Brig. Gen. MB Marwa (Rtd) CON, OFR, alongside some top officials of the Agency, receives Air Vice Marshal Lanre Ibrahim Oluwatoyin, Chief of Defence Space Administration (CDSA) and members of his delegation during their courtesy visit to the Agency’s National Headquarters in Abuja on Tuesday, 29th April 2025.
